name: openEuler sig-HPC SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-HPC SIG maintains 49 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-HPC SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for openEuler High Performance Computing(HPC) SIG. The SIG has 31 core members and maintains 49 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-HPC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-HPC SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at hpc@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-HPC SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-HPC SIG maintains 49 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-HPC.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-HPC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-HPC SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: chunlin fang, luyao, hejiancong. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
